tool_args.label: LIRR PTC Implementation

payload.status: All trains are operating with full PTC functionality on entire LIRR territory
payload.description: LIRR Positive Train Control (PTC) implementation project including contract completion with Alstom/Siemens system integrator, software releases, and ongoing infrastructure support

tool_args.label: MNR PTC Implementation

payload.status: All trains are operating with full PTC Functionality on entire MNR territory including East and West of Hudson
payload.description: Metro-North Railroad Positive Train Control (PTC) implementation project including system integrator contract closure, software variances, and infrastructure projects

tool_args.label: Anticipate finalizing LIRR PTC contract closure agreement with Alstom/Siemens

payload.description: Anticipate finalizing contract closure agreement with Alstom/Siemens, which includes closing out a substantial number of open variances, and a schedule plan commitment to resolve remaining open variances

tool_args.label: Anticipate receiving final OBC software from Siemens

payload.description: Anticipate receiving final on-board computer (OBC) software from Siemens after full subsystem testing

tool_args.label: Receive SDMF delivery for LIRR

payload.event_name: LIRR Software Data Maintenance Facility (SDMF) Delivery
payload.description: Receive Software Data Maintenance Facility (SDMF) delivery. The SDMF house all PTC software, as-builts, documentation, asset information, and variance management.

tool_args.label: Complete integrated FAT and field testing for new OBC software

payload.event_name: LIRR OBC FAT and Field Testing
payload.description: Complete integrated factory acceptance testing and live train field testing for new on-board computer OBC software release

tool_args.label: Complete fleetwide deployment of LIRR OBC software

payload.description: Complete fleetwide deployment of OBC software

tool_args.label: Achieve final LIRR PTC contract completion with Alstom/Siemens

payload.description: Achieve final contract completion with Alstom/Siemens

tool_args.label: MNR PTC System Integrator role assumption and SDMF delivery

payload.event_name: MNR Assume PTC System Integrator Role
payload.description: Assume PTC System Integrator role with Systems Engineering, Configuration Management and Safety functions performed in-house with the Software Data Maintenance Facility (SDMF) delivery

tool_args.label: MNR New Canaan Station bumping post leading end enforcement

payload.event_name: New Canaan Station Bumping Post PTC Enforcement
payload.description: New Canaan Station bumping post leading end enforcement was implemented using PTC system. This is an in-house design first on the NEC Railroads implemented with very low speed/distance limitations

tool_args.label: MNR CP 243 signal cutover

payload.description: Signal cutover is scheduled for the 1st week of Nov followed by PTC Testing and commissioning by Dec 1st

tool_args.label: MNR Hudson Line fiber migration CP 58 to CP 72

payload.description: Migrated from cellular to fiber communication with the installation of new fiber on Hudson Line from CP 58 to CP 72

tool_args.label: Alstom M8 OBC Software 1.5 FRA approval and deployment

payload.description: Alstom M8 OBC Software 1.5 testing was completed, FRA approval request will be filed for revenue testing and deployment in Jan 2024

tool_args.label: MNR PTC ARDT and final contract completion

payload.event_name: MNR PTC ARDT and Final Contract Completion
payload.description: Complete ARDT (Availability Reliability Demonstration Test) & Warranty Program. Achieve Final Contract Completion.

tool_args.label: MNR M8 OBC software 1.5 fleet deployment

payload.event_name: MNR M8 OBC Software 1.5 Fleet Deployment
payload.description: Begin deployment of M8 OBC software 1.5 on the fleet

tool_args.label: LIRR full PTC functionality on entire territory

payload.claim_text: All trains are operating with full PTC functionality on entire LIRR territory and continue to be monitored daily with any issues mitigated.
payload.subject: LIRR PTC Implementation

tool_args.label: MNR full PTC functionality on entire territory

payload.claim_text: All trains are operating with full PTC Functionality on entire MNR territory including East and West of Hudson with continued monitoring daily and any issues mitigated.
payload.subject: MNR PTC Implementation

tool_args.label: Positive Train Stop Release (PTSR) safety condition

payload.claim_text: Positive Train Stop Release (PTSR) – adds additional safety to system by incorporating code required by Dispatchers to enable the Positive Train Stop Override button prior to its use by Engineers.
payload.subject: FRA mandated safety plan conditions

tool_args.label: Missed Transponder mitigation issue

payload.claim_text: Missed Transponder – Mitigation of issue when onboard computer misses read of transponders. FRA and NEC pursuing onboard database update.
payload.subject: FRA mandated safety plan conditions

tool_args.label: PTC Construction Zone for CP 243 interlocking

payload.claim_text: PTC Construction Zone was installed for the ongoing signal and PTC installations for new CP 243 interlocking
payload.subject: MNR PTC Implementation

tool_args.label: Speed upgrades at CP 261

payload.claim_text: Completion of the speed upgrades associated with the 35 switch replacement at CP 261
payload.subject: MNR PTC Implementation
